AGENT_BOTS.DESCRIPTION: Agent AI agents are like the most fabulous members of your team. They can handle the small stuff, so you can focus on the stuff that matters. Give them a try. You can manage your AI agents from this page or create new ones using the 'Add AI agent' button.

AVATAR.ERROR_DELETE: Error deleting AI agent avatar, please try again

BOT_CONFIGURATION.TITLE: Select an AI agent
BOT_CONFIGURATION.DESC: Assign an AI agent to your inbox. They can handle initial conversations and transfer them to a live agent when necessary.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Successfully updated the agent AI agent.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.DISCONNECTED_SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Successfully disconnected the agent AI agent.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not update the agent AI agent. Please try again.
BOT_CONFIGURATION.DISCONNECTED_ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not disconnect the agent AI agent. Please try again.

SURVEY.TITLE: Assign Survey
SURVEY.DESC: Select a survey to be sent to customers after their conversations in this inbox.
SURVEY.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not update survey assignment. Please try again.

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not add AI agent. Please try again later.

LIST.404: No AI agents found. You can create a AI agent by clicking the 'Add AI agent' button.

CONFIRM.TITLE: Confirm Deletion
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not delete AI agent. Please try again.
Could not update AI agent. Please try again.

ACCESS_TOKEN.TITLE: Access Token
ACCESS_TOKEN.DESCRIPTION: Copy the access token and save it securely
ACCESS_TOKEN.RESET_ERROR: Unable to regenerate access token. Please try again

DESCRIPTION.LABEL: Description
DESCRIPTION.PLACEHOLDER: What does this AI agent do?

ERRORS.NAME: AI agent name is required
ERRORS.VALID_URL: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

WEBHOOK.DESCRIPTION: Configure a webhook AI agent to integrate with your custom services. The AI agent will receive and process events from conversations and can respond to them.

CONFIG.TITLE: Configure agent: "{name}"
CONFIG.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not save agent configuration. Please try again.

GENERAL.SECTION_IDENTITY_DESC: Basic information about this agent: name, description and webhook endpoint.
GENERAL.SECTION_INDUSTRY_DESC: Determines the default tools and catalogue examples for this agent.
GENERAL.SECTION_ACCESS_TOKEN_DESC: Use this token to authenticate requests from your webhook to the agent API.
GENERAL.DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: Automotive agency located in Polanco, CDMX. We sell new and pre-owned vehicles...
GENERAL.DESCRIPTION_HINT: Injected as {agency_summary} in the agent's prompt.
GENERAL.INDUSTRY_HINT: Determines the default tools and catalogue examples.

ASSISTANT.SECTION_PRESET_DESC: Apply a predefined personality to quickly configure your assistant.
ASSISTANT.SECTION_IDENTITY_DESC: Name and role that the assistant uses when interacting with customers.
ASSISTANT.SECTION_CHARACTER_DESC: Define the personality, communication tone and main objective of the assistant.
ASSISTANT.SECTION_STYLE_DESC: Example phrases and references that guide how the assistant communicates.
ASSISTANT.PRESET_HINT: Selecting a preset fills the fields below.
ASSISTANT.TONE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Warm, close, positive without being excessive
ASSISTANT.GOAL_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Accompany and facilitate the customer's purchase decision
ASSISTANT.SPEAKING_STYLE_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Of course! For a family of 4, I'd recommend the Corolla Cross. Do you have young children?
ASSISTANT.INSPIRATION_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Michelle Obama + Joy from Inside Out
ASSISTANT.INSPIRATION_HINT: This field is not shown to the customer. It guides the tone of performance.

MODEL.SECTION_MODEL_DESC: Select the AI model that will process conversations for this agent.
MODEL.SECTION_TEMPERATURE_DESC: Controls how deterministic or creative the model's responses are.
MODEL.SECTION_WORD_LIMIT_DESC: Set how long the agent's responses to customers should be.
MODEL.SECTION_CONTEXT_DESC: Maximum conversation history sent to the model in each interaction.

MODELS.gemini-2_5-flash: gemini-2.5-flash — Google · Fast with tool support

MODEL.TEMPERATURE_DESC: Low values = more factual and reproducible responses. High values = more variation and conversational naturalness.
MODEL.WORD_LIMIT_HINT: Injected as {response_word_limit} in the WhatsApp response format prompt.

WORD_LIMIT_OPTIONS.detailed: Detailed — 80-120 words — For customers who prefer more context
WORD_LIMIT_OPTIONS.unlimited: Unlimited — No limit — For web or email channels

MODEL.MAX_TOKENS_HINT: Controls how much previous history the LLM receives per turn.
MODEL.SECTION_API_KEYS_DESC: Override the default API keys for each provider. Leave blank to use the platform default.
MODEL.OPENAI_API_KEY_HINT: Used for GPT models. Overrides the platform default.
MODEL.OPENAI_API_KEY_SET_HINT: A key is already saved. Enter a new value to replace it.
MODEL.GOOGLE_API_KEY_HINT: Used for Gemini models. Overrides the platform default.
MODEL.GOOGLE_API_KEY_SET_HINT: A key is already saved. Enter a new value to replace it.

CAPABILITIES.SECTION_LEAD_WARMING_DESC: Proactively suggest connecting with a human advisor when high purchase intent is detected.
CAPABILITIES.MODULES_HINT: Defines which flows the intent evaluator can take.

general_response.LABEL: General Response
general_response.DESC: Responds about products, services, FAQs and the company.

transfer_chat.LABEL: Transfer to Advisor
transfer_chat.DESC: Connects the customer with an available human agent.

appointments.LABEL: Schedule Appointment
appointments.DESC: Appointment scheduling flow integrated with CRM.
appointments.FALLBACK_TITLE: When disabled, when the customer wants to schedule, the agent should:
appointments.FALLBACK_PHONE: Provide a phone number to schedule
appointments.FALLBACK_HOURS: Show business hours and ask them to call
appointments.FALLBACK_CUSTOM_PLACEHOLDER: Inform that appointments are managed directly at the branch...

send_documents.LABEL: Send Documents
send_documents.DESC: Sends files from the catalogue to the customer via chat (PDFs, images, technical sheets, manuals).

out_of_scope.LABEL: Out of Scope
out_of_scope.DESC: Handles queries that don't correspond to the business.

CAPABILITIES.SECTION_REENGAGEMENT_DESC: Automatically follow up when a customer stops responding mid-conversation.
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_ATTEMPTS_HINT: Delays are absolute from the last agent message. Attempt 1 fires at 5 min, attempt 2 at 15 min, etc.
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_STOP_ON_ANY_REPLY: If the customer responds with any message
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_STOP_ON_AGENT_ASSIGNED: If a human agent is assigned
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_KEYWORDS_HINT: If the customer writes any of these phrases, the reengagement is permanently cancelled for this conversation.
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_REACTIVATION_ON_BOT_REPLY: Restart sequence when the agent sends a new message
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_REACTIVATION_EXCLUDE_LABEL: Do not restart if cancelled by:
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_EXCLUDE_API_CANCEL: The AI agent called the cancel endpoint
CAPABILITIES.REENGAGEMENT_API_DESC: Your AI agent can cancel an active reengagement by calling:
CAPABILITIES.LEAD_WARMING_TURNS_LABEL: Suggest advisor after N turns with high interest
CAPABILITIES.LEAD_WARMING_PHRASES_LABEL: Closing phrases to detect (one per line)

TOOLS.SECTION_DESC: Configure the tools available to this agent and how they behave.
TOOLS.EXAMPLES_HINT: Customer phrases that trigger this tool.

search_product_info.LABEL: Knowledge base search
search_product_info.DESC: Semantic search across indexed products, services and documents.

get_all_products.LABEL: Product catalogue
get_all_products.DESC: Lists available products or services from the catalogue.

get_faqs.LABEL: Frequently asked questions (FAQs)
get_faqs.DESC: Retrieves FAQs relevant to the customer's query.

get_kb_resources.LABEL: Knowledge base index
get_kb_resources.DESC: Lets the agent explore indexed documents before searching the vector store. Useful when the catalogue has many diverse documents.

send_document.LABEL: Send document to customer
send_document.DESC: Sends files from the product catalogue to the customer.

transfer_chat.LABEL: Transfer conversation
transfer_chat.DESC: Transfers the conversation to an available human advisor.

CONTENT.QUESTIONS_HINT: The agent uses these questions to discover needs when the customer has no clear intent. One question at a time.
CONTENT.QUESTION_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. What type of vehicle are you looking for: compact, SUV...?
CONTENT.INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: Free text added to the end of the system prompt. Use this for specific business rules, restrictions or context that doesn't fit in the other fields.
CONTENT.INSTRUCTIONS_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Do not mention competitors. If asked about other brands, gently redirect to Toyota's benefits.
